creator: knu@idaemons.org
text:
Hi.  Sorry for the delay.

At Sun, 13 Feb 2000 20:43:36 +0200 (EET),
Adrian Penisoara <ady@warpnet.ro> wrote:
>  As usual, with considerable delay, here's a patchset that combines
> Akniori and Mikhail Teterin's suggestions (less the in-discussion
> safegets.[ch] files).
> 
>  Aside from turning on building PAM support by default there are just some
> minor cosmetic fixups (thanks Akinori) and usual checksum/makefile
> updates.

  Your view re the safegets.[ch] files sounds reasonable to me.  Seems
better place them under patches/ as patch files, now I think.  I'll
hack up a fix with imap-{uw,utils} after the thaw.  Please do review
them then.


  And at a glance your patch seems fine though I've not tested yet.
Thank you for doing it!

-- 
                           /
                          /__  __
                         / )  )  ) )  /
Akinori -Aki- MUSHA aka / (_ /  ( (__(  <knu@idaemons.org>

"If you choose not to decide you still have made a choice."
